e2e.label: Playwright smoke gate
e2e.note: [e2e-unverified] DB seed blocked by RLS: prisma/seed.ts inserts the super-admin user without setting app.current_tenant_id via SET LOCAL (the app's own request-scoped mechanism), so the tenant_isolation_policy WITH CHECK rejects the insert. Did not weaken RLS to force it through. Next agent with a working seed path (or a seed.ts fix that wraps inserts in a transaction setting app.current_tenant_id) should run the smoke gate.
